001_Ford_BuildingSixSculpture.webp.title: Ford Building 6
001_Ford_BuildingSixSculpture.webp.desc: Concept design for a spatial sculpture installed at Ford's "Building Six" engineering hub in Dearborn, Michigan. Because the facility houses advanced testing equipment, the form language was directly inspired by the mechanical energy and physical components of the motors tested inside.

006_Ford_art.webp.title: Ford Archives Remix
006_Ford_art.webp.desc: A creative exploration of Ford's rich history. I was given access to the historical photography vault to remix and reimagine classic archival imagery, applying modern graphic design treatments to breathe new life into vintage assets.

006_Ford_Wallcovering.webp.title: Ford HQ: Building Six Talent Wall
006_Ford_Wallcovering.webp.desc: Designed for the new employee onboarding center in Building Six. This EGD timeline eases new-hire anxiety while highlighting future goals, combining bold branded graphics with dimensional objects to create an inspiring, playful narrative.

ey_002.webp.title: EY Corporate Pitch
ey_002.webp.desc: Initial milestone tracking and look-dev presentations.
